column1: Is the yield on BP’s bonds maturing in about a decade to two decades, under a leverage and interest coverage maintenance clause with a grace period, less than or equal to the yield on Siemens AG’s bonds that last from twenty to thirty years with the same type of covenant?,"SELECT (SELECT CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""BP p.l.c."" Is the valuation of the Germany-issued bond categorized as a utility investment-grade instrument with a five-year callable term, calculated under the Dodd-Frank stress capital buffer rules, higher than the value of Apple's sovereign investment-grade fixed-rate bond measured over a one-week treasury bill period using the FRTB modellability assessment?,"SELECT (SELECT CurveCalibratedNPV FROM SecuritizedValuationLedger WHERE InstrumentUID = ""Bundesrepublik Deutschland 2034 bond"" AND CreditBucket = ""utility investment grade"" AND LiquidityTenor = ""5-year callable profile"" AND RegulatoryImperative = ""Dodd-Frank stress capital buffer"") > (SELECT CurveCalibratedNPV FROM SecuritizedValuationLedger WHERE InstrumentUID = ""Apple Inc. fixed-rate senior note 2030"" AND CreditBucket = ""sovereign investment grade"" AND LiquidityTenor = ""1-week treasury bill strip"" AND RegulatoryImperative = ""FRTB modellability assessment"") as CurveCalibratedNPV
<th colspan=""2"" halign=""left"">Apple Inc. fixed-rate senior note 2030</th>

","{'inter_row_constraints': ['(CreditBucket == ""sovereign investment grade"").CurveCalibratedNPV > (CreditBucket == ""high yield industrial"").CurveCalibratedNPV', '(CreditBucket == ""sovereign investment grade"").CurveCalibratedNPV > (CreditBucket == ""emerging market sovereign"").CurveCalibratedNPV', '(CreditBucket == ""senior secured corporate"").CurveCalibratedNPV > (CreditBucket == ""subordinated financials"").CurveCalibratedNPV', '(LiquidityTenor == ""3-year bullet funding"").CurveCalibratedNPV > (LiquidityTenor == ""5-year callable profile"").CurveCalibratedNPV', '(InstrumentUID == ""US Treasury 10-year reference"").CurveCalibratedNPV > (InstrumentUID == ""Goldman Sachs Group structured note A"").CurveCalibratedNPV'], 'intra_row_constraints': ['if (InstrumentUID == ""HSBC Holdings PLC perpetual subordinated issue"") then (CreditBucket == ""subordinated financials"")', 'if (InstrumentUID == ""Société Générale covered bond series 5"") then (CreditBucket == ""senior secured corporate"")', 'if (InstrumentUID == ""Iberdrola SA project finance tranche 2027"") then (CreditBucket == ""project finance limited recourse"")', 'if (RegulatoryImperative == ""Liquidity Coverage Ratio monitoring"") then (LiquidityTenor == ""overnight collateralized"")', 'if (RegulatoryImperative == ""IFRS 9 expected credit loss provisioning"") then (CurveCalibratedNPV < 0)', 'if (LiquidityTenor == ""overnight collateralized"") then (CurveCalibratedNPV >= -1000000)', 'if (LiquidityTenor == ""overnight collateralized"") then (CurveCalibratedNPV <= 1000000)']}",yes

","{'inter_row_constraints': ['(FundingTenorBucket == ""ultra-short bespoke"").ModelledEarningsYield < (FundingTenorBucket == ""long-tenor amortising facility"").ModelledEarningsYield', '(LoanLossProvisionSegment == ""stage1 performing prime retail"").ModelledEarningsYield < (LoanLossProvisionSegment == ""stage3 default recoveries"").ModelledEarningsYield', '(MarketLiquidityStencil == ""central clearing deep liquid"").ModelledEarningsYield < (MarketLiquidityStencil == ""end-of-day illiquid windows"").ModelledEarningsYield', '(SecuritisationVintage == ""vintage2009 distressed legacy"").ModelledEarningsYield > (SecuritisationVintage == ""vintage2021 stabilization tranche"").ModelledEarningsYield', '(FundingTenorBucket == ""overnight bilateral funding"").ModelledEarningsYield < (FundingTenorBucket == ""term-synthetic overlay"").ModelledEarningsYield'], 'intra_row_constraints': ['if (LoanLossProvisionSegment == ""stage3 default recoveries"") then (ModelledEarningsYield >= 6.0)', 'if (LoanLossProvisionSegment == ""stage1 performing prime retail"") then (ModelledEarningsYield <= 4.0)', 'if (MarketLiquidityStencil == ""central clearing deep liquid"") then (ModelledEarningsYield <= 3.0)', 'if (MarketLiquidityStencil == ""end-of-day illiquid windows"") then (ModelledEarningsYield >= 7.0)', 'if (FundingTenorBucket == ""long-tenor amortising facility"") then (ModelledEarningsYield >= 4.0)', 'if (FundingTenorBucket == ""permanent capital sleeve"") then (ModelledEarningsYield <= 2.5)']}",yes

Is the daytime liquidity impact of the trade labeled BNP-FXREPO-021 within the secured wholesale funding source at the high-frequency priority tier with a five-year contract duration less than or equal to that of the MS-GLOBAL-REPO-PR1 trade in the international corridor funding category at the top systemic priority level with a contract duration exceeding ten years?,"SELECT (SELECT IntradayLiquidityDelta FROM LiquidityStressMatrix WHERE DealMnemonic = ""BNP-FXREPO-021"" AND FundingPoolLabel = ""wholesale secured funding conduit"" AND CongestionTier = ""high-frequency reversion tier"" AND TenorBucket = ""5 years"") <= (SELECT IntradayLiquidityDelta FROM LiquidityStressMatrix WHERE DealMnemonic = ""MS-GLOBAL-REPO-PR1"" AND FundingPoolLabel = ""international nostro corridor"" AND CongestionTier = ""systemic queue priority A - CLS eligible"" AND TenorBucket = ""bullet > 10y"") as IntradayLiquidityDelta
